session_cookie.name: frontend
session_cookie.note: Standard Magento PHPSESSID. Required for all authenticated requests.

form_key.rotation: Per-session, persists across navigations until logout

csrf_header.name: anti-csrf-token
csrf_header.note: Per-endpoint encrypted token. Each endpoint var (e.g. checkadminurl) has matching encrptycheckadminurl. These tokens are rendered into the page HTML inline.

stock_and_product_lookup.note: Per-product max-qty rendered server-side as <input id=productmaxqty_<id> value=<n>>. SKU and price extracted from rendered HTML. No JSON product API was found.

add_to_cart.method: GET (jQuery.ajax default when no type given in setLocationAjax)
add_to_cart.note: uenc is base64 of current page URL. Server uses it for redirect after add.

add_custom_sku.note: For SKU-direct add when product ID unknown.

cart_view.with_xhr: Returns JSON-wrapped HTML if X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest

endpoint_inventory.checkout_page: GET  /checkout/onepage/  (HTML, exposes all checkout AJAX URLs and encryption keys as window globals)
endpoint_inventory.save_shipping_method: POST /placeorder/shipping/setshippingmethod/  (serialized #shipping-method-form + appendData with holdlocation, defaultlocation, reserveorders, dsd_cost, dsd_user_input)

place_order_THE_BIG_ONE.note: Excludes routingnumber, accountnumber, confirmaccountnumber, accounttype, ownershiptype, businessname, firstname, lastname from the form prior to POST. Success generally redirects to /checkout/onepage/success/. This IS the place-order call for ALL payment methods including Braintree, on-account, etc.

session_state_required_for_order.frontend_cookie: obtained from prior login flow (out of scope for this discovery)
session_state_required_for_order.encrpty<endpoint> tokens: scrape from /checkout/onepage/ HTML, at least 23 of these are defined inline

cookies_full_list: remoteIp / remoteIpCountry / remoteIpCountryName / geoip_country / geoip_prefer (HttpOnly, GeoIP)
selected_language / selected_currency / consent_status / c2NyZWVud2lkdGg (non-Http, UI prefs)

risks_and_unknowns.payment_method_codes: Not enumerated yet. Payment radios are loaded by /placeorder/expresscheckout/loadpayment/. Need a real (read-only) trigger of that AJAX from a non-empty quote to see the available method codes (likely include 'braintree', 'paypal_express', 'banktransfer', possibly an 'on-account' option).
risks_and_unknowns.form_key_rotation_under_xhr: Untested. Does /placeorder/payment/savePayment/ accept the same FORM_KEY across multiple requests in the same session? Magento default: yes, until logout.
risks_and_unknowns.anti_csrf_per_endpoint_keys: encrpty<X> tokens differ per endpoint and per session. Relationship to FORM_KEY appears to be: AES-encrypted form_key with endpoint name as IV/salt. Not reverse-engineered. Easiest is to re-scrape /checkout/onepage/ each session.
risks_and_unknowns.browser_fingerprinting: Cloudflare may challenge requests from non-browser UAs. Tested fetch via Chrome session worked. A Python script will need to (a) reuse a Chrome cookie, OR (b) drive a headless Chrome to scrape FORM_KEY+encrpty tokens then issue API calls within the same session. NOT confirmed whether bare requests with cookie+headers passes CF.
risks_and_unknowns.place_order_payload_full_shape: Confirmed wrapper, not all required payment[<x>] fields. The FORM submit serializes #payment-form which includes Braintree-injected hidden fields (nonce, payment_method_token). For 'on-account' payment, fewer fields needed. Need a live but ABORTED trigger to capture the exact form contents (out of scope for read-only discovery).
risks_and_unknowns.cart_already_has_items: The discovered FORM_KEY belongs to a cart that already had 2 quote items (id 172965, 173305). Real automation MUST start from a known-empty cart or know exactly which items it added.
